name: SomeIpGetSourceAddress
title: SomeIpGetSourceAddress
syntax: long SomeIpGetSourceAddress ( dword messageHandle, byte ipv6Address[] ); // form 2
description: This function returns the IPv4 sender address.

parameters.name: Note This function can only be called within the OnSomeIpMessage callback function.
ipv6Address
parameters.description: The parameter to which the IPv6 address will be written to.

return:
IPv4 sender address (Network Byte Order) as numeric value.
In the Event of an error, the function returns the value 0. The SomeIpGetLastError function can then be used to check whether the value is valid or an error has occurred.
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
